---
title: "Blog"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
toc: true
listing:
  contents: blog
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

Welcome to the blog!

This space collects reflections on projects, data science, and social impact. New posts will appear below as they are added to the `blog/` folder.
